steps.t: The Corsairs have likely fled into the hills to the north of Linhir. Garvir has asked you to seek out the Corsairs that fled during the recent attack …
Garvir's scout can be found somewhere within Hata Khezrat in Dor-en-Ernil. You have discovered the Corsair encampment and should now seek out Garvir's…
Gorroch can be found in Hata Khezrat in eastern Dor-en-Ernil. You have found Garvir's scout and should now free him from his bonds.
Gorroch can be found in Hata Khezrat to the north and slightly east of Linhir. You have freed Gorroch from his bonds and should now speak to him.
